speaker: speaker1
text: Have you seen this news article ? Apparently an organization has made a list to name the new seven wonders of the world and people could vote for them online .

speaker: speaker2
text: Wow , that's really interesting . So who won ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , the Great Wall of China , the Taj Mahal in India .

speaker: speaker2
text: I've been there ! It really is an amazing work of architecture and art . The entire complex is made of white marble and in the interior of the tomb , the walls are covered with gems and emeralds !

speaker: speaker1
text: Cool ! Also amongst the winners is Petra , in Jordan , Mach Pitch in Peru and the pyramid in Chichenitza in Mexico .

speaker: speaker2
text: Wait a minute ! It also says that the Christ Re-deemer statue in Brazil and the Colosseum in Rome are wonders . I would love to go to Italy and see the Colosseum , stand in the middle like a gladiator !

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , let's see if we can find some cheap airfare and we can go towards the end of the year .
